jobName: Neo Aust - 53x53mm Lid Labels x 13 Kinds (11,000) Neo Aust - 80x80mm Front Labels x 10 Kinds Back Labels x 10 Kinds (16,000) Neo Aust - 20x230mm Tamper Labels x 10 Kinds (8,500) Neo Aust - 35x35mm Mini Jar Labels x 1 Kind (1,000) Artwork
lineDescription: Neo Aust - 20x230mm Tamper Labels x 10 Kinds (8,500) Size: 20mm x 230mm Material: PP Metallic Silver Print Colour: White + CMYK Tool: D0904(6,11)(0,1)0.6mm Rectangle Provided on 76mm Cores Finishing: MATTE LAMINATE HAND APPLIED Supply: ***Rolls of 500*** SUPPLIED ON SINGLE ROLLS Qty: 8500 1,000 x Berrylicious 1,000 xBewitching Blue 1,000 xPeachy keen 1,000 xMorninga Magic 1,000 xComplexion (update new 2024 award) 1,000 xGorgeous Green (update new 2024 award) 1,000 x Tumeric Tonic (update new 2024 award) 500 xFlower Power 500 xLove Potion 500 xEnergy Revive ***Special Group Unit Price***
